name: Theresa
bio:
Oracle Messenger of the Demon Hunter Faction, Teresa is a nun of the Main Cathedral with healing and support abilities. She is committed to sheltering and protecting teammates to ensure they carry out missions safely.

Role: Purification Group Heal
Specialty: A backline Support-type hero that can provide recovery effects and negative status purification for allies.

skillSlots.name: Soothe Pain
skillSlots.description: Heals 1 ally hero with lowest HP Ratio for 200% of Theresa's ATK and dispels 2 Debuffs.

skillSlots.name: Healing Prayer
skillSlots.description: Heals 3 allies with lowest HP Ratio for 200% of Theresa's ATK and applies [Demon-Sealing Power].

effects.name: Demon-Sealing Flame
effects.description: [Healing Prayer] also applies [Crit I] to target.

effects.name: Demon-Sealing Flame
effects.description: [Demon-Sealing Power] additionally increases Final DMG RED by 10%.

effects.name: Demon-Sealing Flame
effects.description: [Healing Prayer] range expanded to all allies.
